desc: Fundamental heliocentric astronomical fact confirmed for centuries.
No clinical evidence supports this claim. WHO and CDC have explicitly debunked it.
Viruses are biological agents; they cannot travel on electromagnetic radio waves.

text: India became the most populous country in 2023
desc: UN World Population Prospects data confirms India surpassed China in early 2023.

text: Eating carrots significantly improves night vision
desc: Vitamin A deficiency can impair night vision, but normal intake gives no super-vision boost.

text: GPT-4 passed the US bar exam
desc: OpenAI's technical report confirmed GPT-4 scored around the 90th percentile on the bar exam.

text: The Great Wall of China is visible from space
desc: Multiple astronauts, including Chinese astronaut Yang Liwei, confirmed it is not visible from orbit.
Thoroughly debunked conspiracy. mRNA vaccines contain no electronic components of any kind.

text: Albert Einstein failed mathematics in school
desc: Einstein excelled at mathematics and physics from a young age. This is a persistent myth.

text: Electric vehicles produce zero emissions overall
desc: EVs have zero tailpipe emissions, but manufacturing and electricity generation still produce emissions.

text: The global average temperature has risen by ~1.1°C since pre-industrial times
desc: IPCC reports and multiple global temperature datasets confirm approximately 1.1°C of warming.

text: Humans only use 10% of their brains
desc: Brain imaging studies show virtually all brain regions are active across daily tasks.

text: Aspirin reduces the risk of heart attack
desc: Low-dose aspirin therapy has evidence for secondary prevention but risks for primary prevention. Consult a doctor.

text: The Moon landing in 1969 was faked
desc: Extensive independent evidence including lunar samples, retroreflectors, and Soviet tracking data confirm the Apollo 11 landing.
